name: Call to Action with Image
description: Marketing CTA pairing a hero image with a title, subtitle and action buttons in a two-column layout. Use when: visual promotional block — feature highlight, product/service promotion, signup with brand imagery. Skip when: text-only CTA (use `call-to-action`), pure imagery (use `image` or `slider`), a heading without action (use `title`), or product showcase (use `products` family). `title` is the headline; `subtitle` is a short multi-line elaboration; `image` is the hero image URL — leave empty if the user did not supply one; `imageDescription` becomes the image's `alt` attribute (required for SEO/accessibility — generate from title if not given); `imagePosition` chooses left vs right placement on desktop (`right` is the typical default).

settings.label: Image description
settings.info: Transforms to the "alt" attribute for images. Which is crucial for accessibility, aiding the visually impaired, and enhancing SEO
